item.title: I understand the limits of his power
item.description:
I understand the limits of his power. I’m making a critique of the limits of his ideology.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Like seriosuly she goes from fully bought in to entirly revolutionary and radical #wicked #radical #leftist #liberal

item.title: Replying to @Emmy are you kidding me?
item.description:
Replying to @Emmy are you kidding me? This is so embarrassing. You are justifying being a war criminal because you would be locked up for what tends to be about six months.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Oh yes, the reason America invades everywhere because we love gay people and women so much
item.description:
Oh yes, the reason America invades everywhere because we love gay people and women so much. This is the most radicalising one sentence I have ever heard when it comes to anti-imperialism



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: And by the way, I’m aware that most Israelis are not white, before Zionists lose their ever loving mind - it just so happens the...
item.description:
And by the way, I’m aware that most Israelis are not white, before Zionists lose their ever loving mind - it just so happens the most people represented in their propaganda films are because they know how to benefit from white supremacy, and imperial privilege



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
